positioning.headline: Edge-native inference stack for local ML across native and browser targets.
positioning.native_runtime: Native builds use Rust orchestration with Zig SIMD kernels and optional Metal acceleration.
positioning.wasm_runtime: Browser builds use a pure-Rust WASM runtime for portability and client-side demos.

reference.label: llama.cpp Q4_K_M
reference.notes: Reference only, not a parity claim

runtime_profiles.label: Native Performance
runtime_profiles.summary: Primary native runtime for Apple Silicon and desktop-class local inference.

runtime_profiles.label: ARM Compact
runtime_profiles.summary: Small-device ARM64 profile focused on NEON, low memory, and compact artifacts.

runtime_profiles.label: WASM Portable
runtime_profiles.summary: Pure-Rust browser/client-side runtime for local demos and portable inference.

model_families.label: LLaMA 3.2
model_families.notes: Config and weight mapper path present

features.label: Zig SIMD kernels
features.details: Native kernels target NEON and AVX2 through a C ABI layer.

features.label: Metal GPU
features.details: Apple Silicon acceleration is available behind the metal feature.

features.label: Pure Rust WASM runtime
features.details: The browser path avoids Zig FFI and runs entirely client-side.

features.label: GGUF + safetensors loading
features.details: Native runtime loads common checkpoint formats.

features.label: Speculative decoding
features.details: Self-speculative decode path with KV rollback is available but not a headline stability claim.

features.label: Training workspace
features.details: Autograd, NN, data, graph, and training crates remain available in the workspace.
